NVDA.name: NVIDIA Corporation
NVDA.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以CUDA和Blackwell为核心，提供端到端AI基础设施与平台，驱动云、模型与企业AI应用。
NVDA.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Builds end-to-end AI infrastructure and platform around CUDA and Blackwell for clouds, model makers, and enterprises.

MSFT.name: Microsoft Corporation
MSFT.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以云+Copilot+代理为核心，提供安全合规的企业级AI平台并规模化落地各行业。
MSFT.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Enterprise AI platform spanning cloud, Copilot, and agents with security and responsible deployment.
concrete_bets: AI-driven security, compliance, identity, and privacy

PLTR.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
PLTR.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以AIP把大模型接入Foundry/Gotham和Ontology，推动企业与政府级决策自动化。
PLTR.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Embed LLMs into Foundry and Gotham via AIP to operationalize enterprise and government decision-making.
concrete_bets: LLM integration across Gotham and Foundry

META.name: Meta Platforms, Inc.
META.ai_strategy_one_line_zh: 以Meta AI贯穿社交应用、网页与AI眼镜，结合基础模型和多模态硬件打造下一代交互体验。
META.ai_strategy_one_line_en: Embed Meta AI across apps, web, and AI glasses, using foundation models to power social, discovery, and next-gen interfaces.
concrete_bets: AI glasses and long-term AR wearables

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 这一组都在讲用工具、记忆、MCP、沙箱和编排把模型变成可执行的代理。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Tooling, memory, sandboxing, MCP, and workflow orchestration for agentic systems.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 这些文章聚焦LLM结构、注意力变体、推理扩展、训练目标和长上下文效率。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Model architecture, attention variants, efficient inference, planning, and alignment research.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 这一主题涵盖模型安全、隐私、公共政策、前沿AI治理和生物安全。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Safety, privacy, governance, policy, and biosecurity around frontier AI.

themes.evidence_one_line_zh: 这些内容展示AI在企业流程、客服、医疗、气候和科研合作中的落地与扩散。
themes.evidence_one_line_en: Enterprise deployment and scientific/public-impact applications across health, climate, and research.

alias.notes: 将英文/中英混合的同义项归并到现有中文规范名；将可观测性与成本观测相关表述统一到“AI系统可观测性/成本”；将企业级AI平台和企业数据上的LLM应用归入“LLM/生成式AI应用”。
